title: Pure Hydrogen Secures Landmark with GreenH2 LATAM for Hydrogen Equipment Supply
content: PH2 secures supply deal with GreenH2 LATAM for Hydrogen equipment. Deal includes supply of electrolysers along with refuelling, storage and transport solutions. Pure Hydrogen signed a Master Supply and Distributor Agreement (MSDA) with the Mexico City-based GreenH2 LATAM for hydrogen equipment supply to the tune of US$28m.
author: Analysts Account
